payload.compiled_summary: SU2: review Probe SU2 through artifact://environment-spec/eng_su2_docker, Confirm the current Phase 2 gate state for SU2. Checklist SU2 pack links to the intended environment spec(s), SU2 adapter and evidence bundle reference the same runtime verification report, SU2 anti-patterns and failure signatures match the module class and runtime path. Watch anti-patterns Using SU2 for using su2 as a substitute for unrelated workflows outside thermofluids and chemistry workflows., Skipping the linked health check and provenance capture for artifact://environment-spec/eng_su2_docker., Crossing the adapter boundary for SU2 without a typed contract tied to su2 executable workflows for thermofluids and chemistry workflows..
